notes: Full menu captured from Percy's & Co. gastropub in Ballard; described as 'new american small plates' with both small plates and larger entrees. Buttermilk fried chicken cutlet is listed with two size/price tiers. Oysters priced by half-dozen/dozen. No beverage list provided in the raw text — beverages skipped entirely.

dishes.name: Bread & Butter
dishes.description: Country French bread, sweet butter, rotating jam

dishes.name: Frites
dishes.description: Herb salt, house ketchup

dishes.name: Warm Olive Medley
dishes.description: EVOO, orange peel, chili flake

dishes.name: Hurricane Popcorn
dishes.description: Popcorn, butter, furikake, mochi crunch

dishes.name: Giardiniera
dishes.description: House-pickled veggies, EVOO, Calabrian chili flakes

dishes.name: Truffle Parm Tots
dishes.description: Crispy tots, parmigiano reggiano, truffle oil

dishes.name: Blistered Shishitos
dishes.description: Ponzu, furikake, wasabi ranch, crispy quinoa

dishes.name: Roasted Cauliflower
dishes.description: Pepperoncini, dukkah, pickled red onions, citrus, mint

dishes.name: Charcuterie Plate
dishes.description: Two rotating cheeses, one rotating meat, baguette, accoutrements

dishes.name: Oysters
dishes.description: Baywater Oyster Co. oysters with traditional accoutrements. Available by the half dozen or dozen.

dishes.name: Mediterranean Chop Salad
dishes.description: Romaine, feta, confit tomato, kalamata olives, pepperoncini, cucumber, crispy quinoa, herb vinaigrette. Add local smoked salmon (Loki Fish Company) +$7.

dishes.name: Caesar
dishes.description: Romaine, house dressing, parmigiano reggiano, croutons, cracked pepper. Add white anchovies +$2, fried chicken +$5, or smoked salmon +$7.

dishes.name: Ballard Hot Chicken Sandwich
dishes.description: Buttermilk fried chicken, chili oil, mayonnaise, romaine, dill pickles, served with frites

dishes.name: BLT
dishes.description: Thick cut bacon, romaine, vine ripe tomato, giardiniera aioli, rustic French bread, served with frites

dishes.name: Carnitas Tacos
dishes.description: Three carnitas tacos with braised carnitas, cilantro, onion, salsa moritas, corn tortillas, escabeche. Sub cauliflower for vegetarian.

dishes.name: Percy's Steak House Burger
dishes.description: Painted Hills beef, shoyu aioli, caramelized onions, gruyère, bacon, house steak sauce, brioche bun, served with frites. Sub Beyond patty for vegetarian.

dishes.name: Gnocchi alla Sugo
dishes.description: Potato gnocchi, San Marzano tomato sugo, sun dried tomato, bread crumb, parmigiano reggiano, basil

dishes.name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken Cutlet Dinner — 3 Piece
dishes.description: Three-piece buttermilk fried chicken cutlet served with house buffalo sauce, Louisiana cane syrup, and choice of Caesar salad or creole slaw

dishes.name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken Cutlet Dinner — 6 Piece
dishes.description: Six-piece buttermilk fried chicken cutlet served with house buffalo sauce, Louisiana cane syrup, and choice of Caesar salad or creole slaw

dishes.name: Maddy's Bakeshop Seasonal Cake
dishes.description: Seasonal slice of cake from Maddy's Bakeshop
